text_block_list.text:
Break is over and I'm on my way back to the
office, when...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...I was working out, and before I knew it, the sun
came up. That's all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yawn... ...Maybe I'll go up to the roof, and... catch some shut-eye...

It appears that Narita Brian was losing sleep
during the break rather than resting up...
